title: Vibration Isolation: Protecting Quantum Coherence
description: Learn to identify, characterize, and mitigate mechanical vibrations that can degrade qubit performance in cryogenic quantum computing systems.
learningObjectives: Identify sources of mechanical vibration in dilution refrigerator systems
Understand how vibrations couple to qubit decoherence mechanisms
Design passive and active vibration isolation systems
Analyze vibration spectra and correlate with qubit performance
Implement best practices for vibration-sensitive measurements
